steps.title: Match the table to the text's description
steps.content: The text describes countries “allowing foreign investors to purchase shares of companies.” The table header — “Year That Foreign Investors Were First Allowed to Purchase Shares” — directly tracks this change for each country.

steps.title: Read India's year from the table
steps.content: For India, the table shows 1986. This falls within the “1980s and 1990s” period mentioned in the passage. Choices A, B, and C don't match the table's value for India. That matches choice D — D is correct.
